Hero.title: Zhen Diététique – Therapeutic Nutrition
Hero.desc: Natural nutritional solutions to help manage weight and improve health from the root.

About.title: Nutritional solutions focusing on root causes
About.desc: Zhen Diététique provides natural therapeutic nutrition programs, personalized according to individual health status, lifestyle, and goals. Our method focuses on detoxifying the body, balancing the digestive system, supporting weight management, and improving issues such as stress, digestive disorders, diabetes, cardiovascular health, and aging. The program does not replace medical treatment but serves as comprehensive support, helping you regain energy and physical and mental balance.
About.desc2: Zhen Diététique provides natural therapeutic nutrition programs, personalized according to individual health status, lifestyle, and goals. Our method focuses on detoxifying the body, balancing the digestive system, supporting weight management, and improving issues such as stress, digestive disorders, diabetes, cardiovascular health, and aging. The program does not replace medical treatment but serves as comprehensive support, helping you regain energy and physical and mental balance.

contentFeatures.title: Personalized Programs
contentFeatures.subTitle: Tailored to each individual
contentFeatures.content: The program is built based on your current health status, lifestyle, daily habits, and specific goals, ensuring suitability and feasibility throughout the process.

contentFeatures.title: Focus on Root Causes
contentFeatures.subTitle: Not just treating symptoms
contentFeatures.content: Analyzing and adjusting from the fundamental causes of health issues, rather than just improving external symptoms, to deliver stable and long-term results.

contentFeatures.title: Comprehensive Support
contentFeatures.subTitle: Balancing body and mind
contentFeatures.content: Combining nutritional adjustments with scientific lifestyle guidance to improve digestion, boost energy, stabilize mood, and enhance overall quality of life.

Products.title: Products & Nutritional Solutions
Products.desc: Explore our health programs and products carefully selected and built for every need.

Service.title: Personalized Nutritional Solutions
Service.desc: A roadmap designed specifically to support sustainable recovery and health maintenance.

News.title: News & Updates
News.desc: Stay updated with the latest information on nutrition, health, and promotions from Zhen Diététique.

IntroduceSpa.title: About Zhen Diététique
IntroduceSpa.desc: Zhen Diététique is a natural therapeutic nutrition brand founded by Pharmacist & Nutritionist SADION Thuy Phi. With over 21 years of experience, we are committed to providing personalized nutritional solutions focusing on the root causes of health issues.
IntroduceSpa.desc2: Our programs not only help manage weight but also support overall health improvement, increased energy, and enhanced quality of life. Zhen Diététique accompanies you on a journey to care for your health from the roots, helping you achieve sustainable physical and mental balance.

items.content: An Nam Spa was established at 26-28 Dong Du, District 1, as an independent 9-story building serving customers.
Completed the high-end therapy room system and trained technicians to international standards.
Launched specialized therapeutic massage treatments combined with natural herbs.
Expanded the skincare area and applied modern beauty technology.
Welcomed over 10,000 visitors and became a reputable spa destination in the center of Ho Chi Minh City.
Upgraded the space with a luxurious and relaxing Indochine style.
Launched all-inclusive VIP spa services with private rooms and comprehensive care treatments.

IntroduceConcept.title: Therapeutic Philosophy
IntroduceConcept.desc: Zhen Diététique focuses on improving health from the root causes through natural therapeutic nutrition. Each program is personalized according to your physical condition, helping to manage weight, increase energy, and improve quality of life.

items.title: Olfactory
items.description: The gentle scent of natural essential oils relaxes the mind and creates a pleasant feeling from the very first moment.

items.title: Visual
items.description: A minimalist space combined with soft lighting brings balance, helping the mind enter a state of stillness and relaxation.

items.title: Gustatory
items.description: Refreshing herbal drinks, carefully selected, help detoxify the body and nourish health from within.

items.title: Tactile
items.description: Care treatments are performed gently, helping the body release tension, regenerate energy, and restore natural vitality.

items.title: Auditory
items.description: Soothing therapeutic music blends into the space, helping to alleviate stress and enhance the quality of rest.

carousel.title: Expert Team
carousel.subtitle: Professional therapy standards
carousel.description: Our team of technicians is well-trained, experienced, and constantly updated on new methods to provide optimal therapeutic results for customers.

carousel.title: Personalized Treatment
carousel.subtitle: Designed just for you
carousel.description: Each customer is consulted and built a private treatment plan based on their body condition and specific needs to achieve the best results.

carousel.title: Relaxing Space
carousel.subtitle: Therapeutic spa standards
carousel.description: A quiet, cozy space combined with the scent of essential oils and soft music helps the body and mind fully relax.

carousel.title: Sustainable Care
carousel.subtitle: Long-term value
carousel.description: Sen Spa aims for long-term health care solutions rather than immediate effects, helping to maintain balance and regenerate energy.

IntroduceFacilities.title: Facilities
IntroduceFacilities.desc: Zhen Diététique is equipped with modern facilities and advanced equipment to ensure the best experience for our customers.

IntroduceAward.title: Achievements
IntroduceAward.desc: Sen Spa has been named the most favorite Spa in Ho Chi Minh City for many consecutive years.

items.title: Top 5 Standard Spas – HCMC 100 Interesting Things Part I (2009)
Top 5 Standard Spas – HCMC 100 Interesting Things Part II (2012)

Recruitment.title: Working
Recruitment.desc: Sen Spa's human resources policy is built to make human capital a core competitive advantage. From recruitment, training & development, salary & benefits, to the working environment and corporate culture, all are aimed at attracting talent, developing careers, and ensuring long-term commitment.

contentRecruitment.title: Business Development
contentRecruitment.content: Recruitment must satisfy the goals and requirements of the company's short and long-term business development strategies, executed at specific times and according to annual plans.
